policy_layer_model.regulatory: Baseline derived from the attached law. tenant_id is null and company_overrides_allowed is false.

metadata.indicator_disclaimer: All clause examples and indicator phrases in this dataset are drafting patterns defined by this project for detection purposes. They are not quotations from the Law.

source_documents.title: Personal Data Protection Law
source_documents.document_version: Issued pursuant to Royal Decree No. (M/19) dated 09/02/1443 AH corresponding to 16/09/2021 G; amended pursuant to Royal Decree No. (M/148) dated 05/09/1444 AH corresponding to 27/03/2023 G

source_provisions.source_text: Personal Data: Any data, regardless of its source or form, that may lead to identifying an individual specifically, or that may directly or indirectly make it possible to identify an individual, including name, personal identification number, addresses, contact numbers, license numbers, records, personal assets, bank and credit card numbers, photos and videos of an individual, and any other data of personal nature.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Personal Data as any data, in any source or form, that allows direct or indirect identification of an individual, with a non-exhaustive list of examples.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف البيانات الشخصية بأنها أي بيانات، أياً كان مصدرها أو شكلها، تؤدي إلى تحديد هوية الفرد على وجه التحديد أو تجعل التعرف عليه ممكناً بشكل مباشر أو غير مباشر.

source_provisions.source_text: Processing: Any operation carried out on Personal Data by any means, whether manual or automated, including collecting, recording, saving, indexing, organizing, formatting, storing, modifying, updating, consolidating, retrieving, using, disclosing, transmitting, publishing, sharing, linking, blocking, erasing and destroying data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Processing broadly as any manual or automated operation on Personal Data, listing examples including collection, storage, disclosure, sharing and destruction.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف المعالجة بأنها أي عملية تُجرى على البيانات الشخصية بأي وسيلة يدوية أو آلية، وتشمل الجمع والتخزين والإفصاح والمشاركة والإتلاف.

source_provisions.source_text: Destruction: Any action taken on Personal Data that makes it unreadable and irretrievable, or impossible to identify the related Data Subject.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Destruction as rendering Personal Data unreadable and irretrievable, or making identification of the Data Subject impossible.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف الإتلاف بأنه أي إجراء يجعل البيانات الشخصية غير مقروءة ولا يمكن استرجاعها أو يستحيل معه تحديد هوية صاحب البيانات.

source_provisions.source_text: Disclosure: Enabling any person - other than the Controller or the Processor, as the case may be - to access, collect or use personal data by any means and for any purpose.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Disclosure as enabling any person other than the Controller or Processor to access, collect or use Personal Data by any means and for any purpose.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف الإفصاح بأنه تمكين أي شخص غير المتحكم أو المعالج من الاطلاع على البيانات الشخصية أو جمعها أو استخدامها بأي وسيلة ولأي غرض.

source_provisions.source_text: Transfer: The transfer of Personal Data from one place to another for Processing.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Transfer as moving Personal Data from one place to another for Processing.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف النقل بأنه نقل البيانات الشخصية من مكان إلى آخر لغرض المعالجة.

source_provisions.source_text: Sensitive Data: Personal Data revealing racial or ethnic origin, or religious, intellectual or political belief, data relating to security criminal convictions and offenses, biometric or Genetic Data for the purpose of identifying the person, Health Data, and data that indicates that one or both of the individual's parents are unknown.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Sensitive Data by enumerating the categories that qualify, including racial or ethnic origin, belief, criminal convictions, identifying biometric or genetic data, Health Data, and unknown parentage.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف البيانات الحساسة ويعدد فئاتها، ومنها الأصل العرقي والمعتقد والإدانات الجنائية والبيانات الحيوية أو الوراثية لغرض تحديد الهوية والبيانات الصحية وبيانات مجهولي الأبوين.

source_provisions.source_text: Health Data: Any Personal Data related to an individual's health condition, whether their physical, mental or psychological conditions, or related to Health Services received by that individual.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Health Data as Personal Data relating to an individual's physical, mental or psychological condition or to Health Services received.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف البيانات الصحية بأنها البيانات المتعلقة بالحالة الصحية للفرد الجسدية أو العقلية أو النفسية أو بالخدمات الصحية المقدمة له.

source_provisions.source_text: Credit Data: Any Personal Data related to an individual's request for, or obtaining of, financing from a financing entity, whether for a personal or family purpose, including any data relating to that individual's ability to obtain and repay debts, and the credit history of that person.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines Credit Data as Personal Data relating to an individual's request for or receipt of financing, ability to obtain and repay debt, and credit history.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف البيانات الائتمانية بأنها البيانات المتعلقة بطلب الفرد للتمويل أو حصوله عليه وقدرته على السداد وتاريخه الائتماني.

source_provisions.source_text: Data Subject: The individual to whom the Personal Data relate.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines the Data Subject as the individual to whom the Personal Data relates.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف صاحب البيانات بأنه الفرد الذي تتعلق به البيانات الشخصية.

source_provisions.source_text: Controller: Any Public Entity, natural person or private legal person that specifies the purpose and manner of Processing Personal Data, whether the data is processed by that Controller or by the Processor.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines the Controller as the party that determines the purpose and manner of Processing, whether it processes the data itself or through a Processor.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف المتحكم بأنه الجهة التي تحدد غرض معالجة البيانات الشخصية وكيفيتها، سواء عالجتها بنفسها أو عن طريق المعالج.

source_provisions.source_text: Processor: Any Public Entity, natural person or private legal person that processes Personal Data for the benefit and on behalf of the Controller.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defines the Processor as the party that processes Personal Data for the benefit of and on behalf of the Controller.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يعرّف المعالج بأنه الجهة التي تعالج البيانات الشخصية لصالح المتحكم ونيابة عنه.

source_provisions.source_text: The Law applies to any Processing of Personal Data related to individuals that takes place in the Kingdom by any means, including the Processing of Personal Data related to individuals residing in the Kingdom by any means from any party outside the Kingdom. This includes the data of the deceased if it would lead to them or a member of their family being identified specifically.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Sets the scope of the Law: Processing occurring in the Kingdom by any means, and Processing of data of individuals residing in the Kingdom by any party outside the Kingdom, including data of the deceased where identification would follow.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يحدد نطاق تطبيق النظام ليشمل أي معالجة تتم داخل المملكة، ومعالجة بيانات المقيمين في المملكة من أي جهة خارجها، وبيانات المتوفين إذا أدت إلى تحديد هويتهم أو أحد أفراد أسرهم.

source_provisions.source_text: The scope of applying the Law excludes the individual's Personal Data Processing for purposes that do not go beyond personal or family use, as long as the Data Subject did not publish or disclose it to others. The Regulations shall define personal and family use provided in this Paragraph.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Excludes purely personal or family use from the scope of the Law, provided the data was not published or disclosed, and defers the definition of personal and family use to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يستثني من نطاق النظام معالجة الفرد لبياناته لأغراض شخصية أو عائلية ما لم ينشرها أو يفصح عنها، وتحدد اللائحة معنى الاستخدام الشخصي والعائلي.

source_provisions.source_text: The provisions and procedures stated in this Law shall not prejudice any provision that grants a right to the Data Subject or confers better protection to Personal Data pursuant to any other law or an international agreement to which the Kingdom is a party.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Provides that the Law does not prejudice any provision granting a Data Subject right or better protection under another law or an international agreement to which the Kingdom is a party.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: ينص على ألا تخل أحكام النظام بأي حكم يمنح صاحب البيانات حقاً أو يوفر حماية أفضل بموجب نظام آخر أو اتفاقية دولية تكون المملكة طرفاً فيها.

source_provisions.source_text: The right to be informed about the legal basis and the purpose of the Collection of their Personal Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Grants the Data Subject the right to be informed of the legal basis and purpose of Collection.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات الحق في العلم بالأساس النظامي لجمع بياناته والغرض من الجمع.

source_provisions.source_text: The right to access their Personal Data held by the Controller, in accordance with the rules and procedures set out in the Regulations, and without prejudice to the provisions of Article (9) of this Law.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Grants the Data Subject a right of access to their Personal Data held by the Controller, subject to rules in the Regulations and to Article 9.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات حق الاطلاع على بياناته لدى المتحكم وفق ما تحدده اللائحة ودون إخلال بأحكام المادة التاسعة.

source_provisions.source_text: The right to request obtaining their Personal Data held by the Controller in a readable and clear format, in accordance with the controls and procedures specified by the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Grants the Data Subject the right to obtain their Personal Data in a readable and clear format, per controls set in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات حق الحصول على بياناته بصيغة واضحة ومقروءة وفق ضوابط اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The right to request correcting, completing, or updating their Personal Data held by the Controller.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Grants the Data Subject the right to request correction, completion or updating of their Personal Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات حق طلب تصحيح بياناته أو إكمالها أو تحديثها.

source_provisions.source_text: The right to request a Destruction of their Personal Data held by the Controller when such Personal Data is no longer needed by Data Subject, without prejudice to the provisions of Article (18) of this Law.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Grants the Data Subject the right to request destruction of their Personal Data when no longer needed by them, without prejudice to Article 18.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات حق طلب إتلاف بياناته متى لم تعد لازمة، دون إخلال بأحكام المادة الثامنة عشرة.

source_provisions.source_text: Except for the cases stated in this Law, neither Personal Data may be processed nor the purpose of Personal Data Processing may be changed without the consent of the Data Subject. The Regulations Shall set out the conditions of the consent, the cases in which the consent must be explicit, and the terms and conditions related to obtaining the consent of the legal guardian if the Data Subject fully or partially lacks legal capacity.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Data Subject's consent for Processing and for any change to the Processing purpose, except in cases stated in the Law, and defers consent conditions to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يشترط موافقة صاحب البيانات لمعالجة بياناته أو تغيير غرض المعالجة، عدا الحالات المنصوص عليها في النظام، وتحدد اللائحة شروط الموافقة.
exceptions: Cases stated in the Law, in particular Article (6)

source_provisions.source_text: In all cases, Data Subject may withdraw the consent mentioned in Paragraph (1) of this Article at any time; the Regulations determines the necessary controls for such case.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Provides that the Data Subject may withdraw consent at any time, with controls to be set by the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز لصاحب البيانات سحب موافقته في أي وقت، وتحدد اللائحة الضوابط اللازمة لذلك.

source_provisions.source_text: In the following cases, Processing of Personal Data shall not be subject to the consent referred to in Paragraph (1) of Article (5) herein: 1-If the Processing serves actual interests of the Data Subject, but communicating with the Data Subject is impossible or difficult. 2-If the Processing is pursuant to another law or in implementation of a previous agreement to which the Data Subject is a party. 3-If the Controller is a Public Entity and the Processing is required for security purposes or to satisfy judicial requirements. 4-If the Processing is necessary for the purpose of legitimate interest of the Controller, without prejudice to the rights and interests of the Data Subject, and provided that no Sensitive Data is to be processed. Related provisions and controls are set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Lists four cases in which Processing does not require the Data Subject's consent, including legitimate interest which is conditioned on no Sensitive Data being processed and on not prejudicing the Data Subject's rights.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يحدد أربع حالات لا تخضع فيها المعالجة لاشتراط الموافقة، منها المصلحة المشروعة للمتحكم بشرط عدم معالجة بيانات حساسة وعدم الإخلال بحقوق صاحب البيانات.
conditions: (1) actual interests of the Data Subject where communication is impossible or difficult
(2) pursuant to another law or a previous agreement to which the Data Subject is a party
(3) Controller is a Public Entity and Processing is required for security purposes or judicial requirements
(4) legitimate interest of the Controller, without prejudice to Data Subject rights and provided no Sensitive Data is processed

source_provisions.source_text: The consent referred to in paragraph (1) of Article (5) of this Law may not form a condition of providing a service or a benefit, unless such service or benefit is directly related to the Processing of Personal Data for which the consent is given.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits making consent a condition for providing a service or benefit unless the service or benefit is directly related to the Processing for which consent is given.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع اشتراط الموافقة لتقديم خدمة أو منفعة ما لم تكن مرتبطة مباشرة بمعالجة البيانات محل الموافقة.

source_provisions.source_text: Subject to the provisions of this Law and the Regulations regarding the Disclosure of Personal Data, the Controller shall only select Processors providing the necessary guarantees to implement the provisions of this Law and the Regulations. The Controller shall also monitor the compliance of said Processors with the provisions of this Law and the Regulations. This shall not prejudice the Controller's responsibilities towards the Data Subject or the Competent Authority as the case may be. The Regulations shall set out the provisions necessary in this regard, including provisions related to any subsequent contracts conducted by the Processor.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to select only Processors that provide the necessary guarantees, to monitor Processor compliance, and preserves the Controller's responsibility towards the Data Subject and the Competent Authority; details, including subsequent contracts concluded by the Processor, are deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم باختيار معالجين يقدمون الضمانات اللازمة لتطبيق النظام ومراقبة التزامهم، مع بقاء مسؤولية المتحكم تجاه صاحب البيانات والجهة المختصة، وتحدد اللائحة الأحكام اللازمة بما فيها العقود اللاحقة التي يبرمها المعالج.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller may set time frames for exercising the right to access Personal Data stated in Paragraph (2) of Article (4) herein as stipulated in the Regulations. The Controller may limit the exercise of this right in the following cases: a) If this is necessary to protect the Data Subject or other parties from any harm, according to the provisions set forth the Regulations. b) If the Controller is a Public Entity and the restriction is required for security purposes, required by another law, or required to fulfill judicial requirements.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Permits the Controller to set time frames for the access right and to limit it in two specified cases, as further set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز للمتحكم تحديد مُدد لممارسة حق الاطلاع وتقييده في حالتين محددتين وفق ما تبينه اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall prevent the Data Subject from accessing Personal Data in any of the situations stated in Paragraphs (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) and (6) of Article (16) herein.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to prevent access in the situations listed in Article 16 paragraphs 1 to 6.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بمنع الاطلاع في الحالات المنصوص عليها في الفقرات (1-6) من المادة السادسة عشرة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller may only collect Personal Data directly from the Data Subject and may only process Personal Data for the purposes for which they have been collected. However, the Controller may collect Personal Data from a source other that the Data Subject and may process Personal Data for purposes other than the ones for which they have been collected in the following situations: 1- The Data Subject gives their consent in accordance with the provisions of this Law. 2- Personal Data is publicly available or was collected from a publicly available source. 3- The Controller is a Public Entity, and the Collection or Processing of the Personal Data is required for public interest or security purposes, or to implement another law, or to fulfill judicial requirements. 4- Complying with this may harm the Data Subject or affect their vital interests 5- Personal Data Collection or Processing is necessary to protect public health, public safety, or to protect the life or health of specific individuals. 6- Personal Data is not to be recorded or stored in a form that makes it possible to directly or indirectly identify the Data Subject. 7- Personal Data Collection is necessary to achieve legitimate interests of the Controller, without prejudice to the rights and interests of the Data Subject, and provided that no Sensitive Data is to be processed. The Regulations shall set out the provisions, controls and procedures related to what is stated in paragraphs (2) to (7) of this Article.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Establishes the rule of direct collection from the Data Subject and of processing only for the purposes of collection, subject to seven enumerated exceptions; provisions for exceptions (2) to (7) are deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يقرر قاعدة الجمع المباشر من صاحب البيانات وقصر المعالجة على أغراض الجمع، مع سبع حالات استثنائية، وتحدد اللائحة أحكام الحالات من (2) إلى (7).
exceptions: (3) Public Entity Controller for public interest, security, another law or judicial requirements
(4) compliance may harm the Data Subject or affect vital interests
(5) necessary to protect public health, public safety, or life or health of specific individuals
(6) data not recorded or stored in identifiable form
(7) legitimate interests of the Controller, no Sensitive Data, no prejudice to Data Subject rights

source_provisions.source_text: The purpose for which Personal Data is collected shall be directly related to the Controller's purposes, and shall not contravene any legal provisions.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Collection purpose to be directly related to the Controller's purposes and not contrary to any legal provision.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يشترط أن يكون غرض جمع البيانات متصلاً مباشرة بأغراض المتحكم وألا يخالف الأحكام النظامية.

source_provisions.source_text: The methods and means of Personal Data Collection shall not conflict with any legal provisions, shall be appropriate for the circumstances of the Data Subject, shall be direct, clear and secure, and shall not involve any deception, misleading or extortion.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires collection methods to be lawful, appropriate, direct, clear and secure and free of deception, misleading or extortion.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يشترط أن تكون وسائل الجمع نظامية ومناسبة ومباشرة وواضحة وآمنة وخالية من الخداع أو التضليل أو الابتزاز.

source_provisions.source_text: The content of the Personal Data shall be appropriate and limited to the minimum amount necessary to achieve the purpose of the Collection. Content that may lead to specifically identifying Data Subject once the purpose of Collection is achieved shall be avoided. The Regulations shall set out the necessary controls in this regard.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires data content to be appropriate and limited to the minimum necessary for the purpose, and to avoid identifying content once the purpose is achieved; controls deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يوجب أن يكون مضمون البيانات مناسباً ومقتصراً على الحد الأدنى اللازم لتحقيق الغرض، وتجنّب ما يؤدي إلى تحديد الهوية بعد تحقق الغرض.

source_provisions.source_text: If the Personal Data collected is no longer necessary for the purpose for which it has been collected, the Controller shall, without undue delay, cease their Collection and destroy previously collected Personal Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller, without undue delay, to cease Collection and destroy previously collected data once it is no longer necessary for the purpose.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بالتوقف عن الجمع وإتلاف البيانات المجموعة سابقاً دون تأخير غير مبرر متى لم تعد لازمة للغرض.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall use a privacy policy and make it available to Data Subjects for their information prior to collecting their Personal Data. The policy shall specify the purpose of Collection, Personal Data to be collected, the means used for Collection, Processing, storage and Destruction, and information about the Data Subject rights and how to exercise such rights.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to have a privacy policy available to Data Subjects before Collection, specifying purpose, data collected, means of collection, processing, storage and destruction, and Data Subject rights.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بوضع سياسة خصوصية وإتاحتها لأصحاب البيانات قبل الجمع، تتضمن غرض الجمع والبيانات المجموعة ووسائل الجمع والمعالجة والتخزين والإتلاف وحقوق صاحب البيانات.

source_provisions.source_text: When collecting Personal Data directly from the Data Subject, the Controller shall take appropriate measures to inform the Data Subject of the following upon Collection: 1- The legal basis for collecting their Personal Data. 2- The purpose of the Collection, and shall specify the Personal Data whose Collection is mandatory and the Personal Data whose Collection is optional. The Data Subject shall be informed that the Personal Data will not be subsequently processed in a manner inconsistent with the Collection purpose or in cases other than those stated in Article (10) of this Law. 3- Unless the Collection is for security purposes, the identity of the person collecting the Personal Data and the address of its representative, if necessary. 4- The entities to which the Personal Data will be disclosed, the capacity of such entities, and whether the Personal Data will be transferred, disclosed or processed outside the Kingdom. 5- The potential consequences and risks that may result from not collecting the Personal Data. 6- The rights of the Data Subject pursuant to Article (4) herein. 7- Such other elements as set out in the Regulations based on the nature of the activity done by the Controller.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller, on direct collection, to inform the Data Subject of seven enumerated items including the legal basis, purpose, recipients and whether data will be transferred, disclosed or processed outside the Kingdom.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم عند الجمع المباشر بإبلاغ صاحب البيانات بسبعة عناصر تشمل الأساس النظامي والغرض والجهات المفصح لها وما إذا كانت البيانات ستُنقل أو تُعالج خارج المملكة.
conditions: (1) legal basis
(2) purpose and mandatory vs optional data, and notice of no incompatible further processing
(3) identity of collector and representative address, unless collection is for security purposes
(4) entities of disclosure, their capacity, and whether data will be transferred, disclosed or processed outside the Kingdom
(5) consequences and risks of not collecting
(6) Data Subject rights under Article (4)
(7) other elements set out in the Regulations

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller may not process Personal Data without taking sufficient steps to verify the Personal Data accuracy, completeness, timeliness and relevance to the purpose for which it is collected in accordance with the provisions of the Law.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits Processing without sufficient steps to verify accuracy, completeness, timeliness and relevance of the data to the collection purpose.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع معالجة البيانات دون اتخاذ خطوات كافية للتحقق من صحتها واكتمالها وحداثتها وصلتها بالغرض.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller may not Disclose Personal Data except in the following situations: 1- Data Subject consents to the Disclosure in accordance with the provisions of the Law. 2- Personal Data has been collected from a publicly available source. 3- The entity requesting Disclosure is a Public Entity, and the Collection or Processing of the Personal Data is required for public interest or security purposes, or to implement another law, to fulfill judicial requirements. 4- The Disclosure is necessary to protect public health, public safety, or to protect the lives or health of specific individuals. 5- The Disclosure will only involve subsequent Processing in a form that makes it impossible to directly or indirectly identify the Data Subject. 6- The Disclosure is necessary to achieve legitimate interests of the Controller, without prejudice to the rights and interests of the Data Subject, and provided that no Sensitive Data is to be processed. The Regulations shall set out the provisions, controls and procedures related to what is stated in paragraphs (2) to (6) of this Article.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits Disclosure of Personal Data except in six enumerated situations; provisions for situations (2) to (6) are deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع الإفصاح عن البيانات الشخصية إلا في ست حالات محددة، وتحدد اللائحة أحكام الحالات من (2) إلى (6).
exceptions: (2) data collected from a publicly available source
(3) requesting entity is a Public Entity for public interest, security, another law or judicial requirements
(4) necessary to protect public health, public safety, or lives or health of specific individuals
(5) subsequent processing in non-identifiable form only
(6) legitimate interests of the Controller, no Sensitive Data, no prejudice to Data Subject rights

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall not disclose Personal Data in the situations stated in Paragraphs (1, 2, 5) and (6) of Article (15) if the Disclosure: 1- Represents a threat to security, harms the reputation of the Kingdom, or conflicts with the interests of the Kingdom. 2- Affects the Kingdom's relations with any other state. 3- Prevents the detection of a crime, affects the rights of an accused to a fair trial, or affects the integrity of existing criminal procedures. 4- Compromises the safety of an individual. 5- Results in violating the privacy of an individual other than the Data Subject, as set out in the Regulations. 6- Conflicts with the interests of a person that fully or partially lacks legal capacity. 7- Violates legally established professional obligations. 8- Involves a violation of an obligation, procedure, or judicial decision. 9- Exposes the identity of a confidential source of information in a manner detrimental to the public interest.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits Disclosure otherwise permitted under Article 15 paragraphs (1, 2, 5) and (6) where any of nine listed harms would result.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع الإفصاح المسموح به في الفقرات (1، 2، 5، 6) من المادة الخامسة عشرة إذا ترتب عليه أي من تسع حالات ضرر محددة.

source_provisions.source_text: If Personal Data is corrected, completed or updated, the Controller shall notify such amendment to all the other entities to which such Personal Data has been transferred and make the amendment available to such entities.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to notify every other entity to which the data was transferred of any correction, completion or update, and to make the amendment available to them.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بإبلاغ جميع الجهات التي نُقلت إليها البيانات بأي تصحيح أو إكمال أو تحديث وإتاحة التعديل لها.

source_provisions.source_text: The Regulations shall set out the time frames for correction and updating of Personal Data, types of correction, and the procedures required to avoid the consequences of Processing incorrect, inaccurate or outdated Personal Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defers to the Regulations the time frames, types and procedures for correcting and updating Personal Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: تحيل إلى اللائحة تحديد مُدد التصحيح والتحديث وأنواعه والإجراءات اللازمة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall, without undue delay, Destroy the Personal Data when no longer necessary for the purpose for which they were collected. However, the Controller may retain data after the purpose of the Collection ceases to exist; provided that it does not contain anything that may lead to specifically identifying Data Subject pursuant to the controls stipulated in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires destruction without undue delay once the data is no longer necessary for the collection purpose, while permitting retention of data that cannot specifically identify the Data Subject under controls set in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بإتلاف البيانات دون تأخير غير مبرر متى انتفت الحاجة إليها، مع جواز الاحتفاظ بما لا يؤدي إلى تحديد الهوية وفق ضوابط اللائحة.
exceptions: Retention permitted where the retained data cannot lead to specifically identifying the Data Subject, pursuant to controls in the Regulations

source_provisions.source_text: In the following cases, the Controller shall retain the Personal Data after the purpose of the Collection ceases to exist: a) If there is a legal basis for retaining the Personal Data for a specific period, in which case the Personal Data shall be destroyed upon the lapse of that period or when the purpose of the Collection is satisfied, whichever longer. b) If the Personal Data is closely related to a case under consideration before a judicial authority and the retention of the Personal Data is required for that purpose, in which case the Personal Data shall be destroyed once the judicial procedures are concluded.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires retention beyond the purpose in two cases: a legal basis prescribing a specific retention period, and data closely related to a case before a judicial authority, with destruction due at the end of the period or of the judicial procedures.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يوجب الاحتفاظ بالبيانات بعد انتهاء الغرض في حالتين: وجود أساس نظامي لمدة محددة، وارتباط البيانات بقضية منظورة أمام جهة قضائية.
conditions: a) legal basis for a specific retention period
b) data closely related to a case before a judicial authority

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall implement all the necessary organizational, administrative and technical measures to protect Personal Data, including during the Transfer of Personal Data, in accordance with the provisions and controls set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to implement all necessary organizational, administrative and technical measures to protect Personal Data, including during Transfer, per controls in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم باتخاذ جميع التدابير التنظيمية والإدارية والتقنية اللازمة لحماية البيانات الشخصية بما في ذلك أثناء نقلها وفق ضوابط اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall notify the Competent Authority upon knowing of any breach, damage, or illegal access to personal data, in accordance with the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to notify the Competent Authority upon becoming aware of any breach, damage or illegal access, in accordance with the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بإبلاغ الجهة المختصة فور علمه بأي تسرب للبيانات أو تلفها أو الوصول غير المشروع إليها وفق اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall notify the Data Subject of any breach, damage or illegal access to their Personal Data that would cause damage to their data or cause prejudice to their rights and interests, in accordance with the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to notify the Data Subject of a breach, damage or illegal access that would damage their data or prejudice their rights and interests, in accordance with the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بإبلاغ صاحب البيانات بأي تسرب أو تلف أو وصول غير مشروع يلحق ضرراً ببياناته أو يمس حقوقه ومصالحه وفق اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall respond to the requests of the Data Subject pertaining to their rights under this Law within such period and in such method as set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to respond to Data Subject rights requests within the period and by the method set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بالاستجابة لطلبات صاحب البيانات المتعلقة بحقوقه خلال المدة وبالطريقة التي تحددها اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall conduct an impact assessment of Personal Data Processing in relation to any product or service, based on the nature of the activity carried out by the Controller, in accordance with the relevant provisions of the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to conduct an impact assessment of Processing for any product or service, based on the nature of its activity, per the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بإجراء تقييم أثر لمعالجة البيانات الشخصية على أي منتج أو خدمة بحسب طبيعة نشاطه وفق اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: Without prejudice to this Law, the Regulations shall set out additional controls and procedures for the Processing of Health Data in a manner that ensures the privacy of the Data Subject and protects their rights under this Law. Such additional controls and procedures shall include the following: 1- Restricting the right to access Health Data, including medical files, to the minimum number of employees or workers and only to the extent necessary to provide the required Health Services. 2- Restricting Health Data Processing procedures and operations to the minimum extent possible of employees and workers as necessary to provide Health Services or offer health insurance programs.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defers additional Health Data controls to the Regulations while stating that they shall include restricting access to and processing of Health Data to the minimum number of workers necessary.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: تحيل إلى اللائحة ضوابط إضافية لمعالجة البيانات الصحية، على أن تتضمن قصر الاطلاع والمعالجة على أقل عدد ممكن من العاملين وبالقدر اللازم.

source_provisions.source_text: Without prejudice to this Law, the Regulations shall set out additional controls and procedures for the Processing of Credit Data in a manner that ensures the privacy of the Data Subject and protects their rights under this Law and the Credit Information Law. Such controls and procedures shall include the following: 1- Implementing appropriate measures to verify that the Data Subject has given their explicit consent to the Collection of the Personal Data, changing the purpose of the Collection, or Disclosure or Publishing of the Personal Data in accordance with the provisions of this Law and the Credit Information Law. 2- Requiring that the Data Subject be notified when a request for Disclosure of their Credit Data is received from any entity.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defers additional Credit Data controls to the Regulations while stating that they shall include verifying explicit consent and notifying the Data Subject of any request to disclose their Credit Data.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: تحيل إلى اللائحة ضوابط إضافية للبيانات الائتمانية تشمل التحقق من الموافقة الصريحة وإشعار صاحب البيانات بأي طلب إفصاح عن بياناته الائتمانية.

source_provisions.source_text: With the exception of the awareness-raising materials sent by Public Entities, Controller may not use personal means of communication, including the post and email, of the Data Subject to send advertising or awareness-raising materials, unless: 1- Obtaining the prior consent of the targeted recipient for such materials. 2- The sender of the material shall provide a clear mechanism, as set out in the Regulations, that enables the targeted recipient to request stopping receiving such materials if they desire so. 3- The Regulations shall set out the provisions concerning the aforementioned advertising and awareness-raising materials, as well as the conditions and situations concerning the consent of the recipient to receive aforementioned materials.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits using the Data Subject's personal means of communication to send advertising or awareness materials unless prior consent is obtained and a clear opt-out mechanism is provided, with awareness materials from Public Entities excepted.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع استخدام وسائل الاتصال الشخصية لإرسال مواد إعلانية أو توعوية إلا بموافقة مسبقة وتوفير آلية واضحة لإيقاف الاستقبال، مع استثناء المواد التوعوية من الجهات العامة.
conditions: (1) prior consent of the targeted recipient
(2) a clear opt-out mechanism as set out in the Regulations
exceptions: Awareness-raising materials sent by Public Entities

source_provisions.source_text: With the exception of Sensitive Data, Personal Data may be processed for marketing purposes, if it is collected directly from the Data Subject and their consent is given in accordance with the provisions of Law; the Regulations shall set out the controls in such regard.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Permits Processing for marketing purposes only where the data is not Sensitive Data, is collected directly from the Data Subject and consent is given under the Law.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز معالجة البيانات الشخصية لأغراض التسويق بشرط ألا تكون بيانات حساسة وأن تُجمع مباشرة من صاحب البيانات وبموافقته.
conditions: data is not Sensitive Data
collected directly from the Data Subject
consent given in accordance with the Law

source_provisions.source_text: Personal data may be collected or processed for scientific, research, or statistical purposes without the consent of the Data Subject in the following situations: 1-If it does not specifically identify the Data Subject. 2-If evidence of the Data Subject's identity will be destroyed during the Processing and prior to Disclosure of such data to any other entity, if it is not Sensitive Data. 3-If personal data is collected or processed for these purposes is required by another law or in implementation of a previous agreement to which the Data Subject is a party. The Regulations shall set out the controls required by the provisions of this Article.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Permits collection or processing for scientific, research or statistical purposes without consent in three enumerated situations, with controls deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز جمع أو معالجة البيانات لأغراض علمية أو بحثية أو إحصائية دون موافقة في ثلاث حالات محددة، وتحدد اللائحة الضوابط.
conditions: (1) data does not specifically identify the Data Subject
(2) identity evidence destroyed during processing and before disclosure, where not Sensitive Data
(3) required by another law or a previous agreement to which the Data Subject is a party

source_provisions.source_text: It is not permissible to copy official documents where Data Subjects are identifiable, except where it is required by law, or when a competent public authority requests copying such documents pursuant to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Prohibits copying official identifying documents except where required by law or requested by a competent public authority pursuant to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنع نسخ الوثائق الرسمية التي تحدد هوية أصحاب البيانات إلا إذا تطلب النظام ذلك أو طلبته جهة عامة مختصة وفق اللائحة.
exceptions: Requested by a competent public authority pursuant to the Regulations

source_provisions.source_text: Subject to the provisions of Paragraph (2) of this Article, a Controller may Transfer Personal Data outside the Kingdom or disclose it to a party outside the Kingdom, in order to achieve any of the following purposes: A. If this is relating to performing an obligation under an agreement, to which the Kingdom is a party. B. If it is to serve the interests of the Kingdom. C. If this is to the performance of an obligation to which the Data Subject is a party D. If this is to fulfill other purposes as set out in the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Permits Transfer or Disclosure outside the Kingdom only for four enumerated purposes, the fourth of which is deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز نقل البيانات الشخصية خارج المملكة أو الإفصاح عنها لجهة خارجها لأربعة أغراض محددة، آخرها ما تحدده اللائحة.
conditions: A. performing an obligation under an agreement to which the Kingdom is a party
B. serving the interests of the Kingdom
C. performing an obligation to which the Data Subject is a party
D. other purposes as set out in the Regulations

source_provisions.source_text: The conditions that must be met when there is a Transfer or Disclosure of Personal Data, according to what is stated in Paragraph (1) of this Article, are as follows: A. The Transfer or Disclosure shall not cause any prejudice to national security or the vital interests of the Kingdom. B. There is an adequate level of protection for Personal Data outside the Kingdom. Such level of protection shall be at least equivalent to the level of protection guaranteed by the Law and Regulations, according to the results of an assessment conducted by the Competent Authority in coordination with whomever it deems appropriate from the other relevant authorities. C. The Transfer or Disclosure shall be limited to the minimum amount of Personal Data needed.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Sets three cumulative conditions for cross-border Transfer or Disclosure: no prejudice to national security or vital interests, an adequate level of protection outside the Kingdom as assessed by the Competent Authority, and limitation to the minimum amount of data needed.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يحدد ثلاثة شروط لنقل البيانات خارج المملكة: عدم الإخلال بالأمن الوطني أو المصالح الحيوية، ووجود مستوى حماية مناسب وفق تقييم الجهة المختصة، وقصر النقل على الحد الأدنى اللازم.
conditions: A. no prejudice to national security or the vital interests of the Kingdom
B. adequate level of protection outside the Kingdom at least equivalent to that of the Law and Regulations, per an assessment by the Competent Authority
C. limited to the minimum amount of Personal Data needed

source_provisions.source_text: Paragraph (2) of this Article shall not apply to cases of extreme necessity to preserve the life or vital interests of the Data Subject or to prevent, examine or treat disease.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Disapplies the transfer conditions of Paragraph (2) in cases of extreme necessity to preserve life or vital interests of the Data Subject or to prevent, examine or treat disease.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يستثني من شروط الفقرة (2) حالات الضرورة القصوى للحفاظ على حياة صاحب البيانات أو مصالحه الحيوية أو للوقاية من مرض أو فحصه أو علاجه.

source_provisions.source_text: The Regulations shall set out the provisions, criteria and procedures related to the implementing this Article, including applicable exceptions for Controllers regarding conditions referred to in Subparagraphs (b) and (c) of Paragraph (2) of this Article, as well as controls and procedures for such exemptions.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defers to the Regulations the provisions, criteria and procedures for implementing Article 29, including exemptions from the conditions in Paragraph 2 subparagraphs (b) and (c).
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: تحيل إلى اللائحة تحديد أحكام ومعايير وإجراءات تطبيق المادة، بما في ذلك الاستثناءات من الشرطين (ب) و(ج) من الفقرة (2).

source_provisions.source_text: The Regulations shall identify the situations where the Controller shall appoint one or more persons as personal data protection officer(s). and shall set the responsibilities of any such person in accordance with the provisions of this Law.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Defers to the Regulations the situations requiring appointment of a personal data protection officer and the responsibilities of that officer.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: تحيل إلى اللائحة تحديد الحالات التي يلزم فيها تعيين مسؤول لحماية البيانات الشخصية ومسؤولياته.

source_provisions.source_text: The Controller shall cooperate with the Competent Authority in performing its duties to supervise the implementation of the provisions of this Law and the Regulations, and shall take such steps as necessary in connection with the related matters referred to the Controller by the Competent Authority.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to cooperate with the Competent Authority in its supervisory duties and to take the steps necessary on matters referred to it.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بالتعاون مع الجهة المختصة في أداء مهامها الإشرافية واتخاذ ما يلزم بشأن ما تحيله إليه.

source_provisions.source_text: The Competent Authority, in order to carry out its duties related to supervising the implementation of the provisions of the Law and Regulations, may: A. Request the necessary documents or information from the Controller to ensure its compliance with the provisions of the Law and Regulations. B. Request the cooperation of any other party for the purposes of support in accomplishing supervisory duties and enforcement of the provisions of the Law and Regulations. C. Specify the appropriate tools and mechanisms for monitoring Controllers' compliance with the provisions of the Law and the Regulations, including maintaining a national register of Controllers for this purpose. D. Provide services related to Personal Data protection through the national register referred to in Subparagraph (c) of this Paragraph or through any other means deemed appropriate. The Competent Authority may collect a fee for the Personal Data protection services it may provide.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Empowers the Competent Authority to request documents and information from the Controller, request cooperation from other parties, specify monitoring tools including a national register of Controllers, and provide related services.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح الجهة المختصة صلاحيات تشمل طلب المستندات والمعلومات من المتحكم وطلب تعاون أي طرف آخر وتحديد أدوات الرقابة بما فيها السجل الوطني للمتحكمين.

source_provisions.source_text: Without prejudice to Article (18) herein, the Controller shall maintain records, for such a period as required under the Regulations, of the Personal Data Processing activities, based on the nature of the activity carried out by the Controller. Such records are to be available whenever requested by the Competent Authority. The records shall contain the following information at a minimum: 1-Contact details of the Controller. 2-The purpose of the Personal Data Processing. 3-Description of the categories of Personal Data Subjects. 4-Any other entity to which Personal Data has been, or will be, disclosed. 5-Whether the Personal Data has been or will be transferred outside the Kingdom or disclosed to an entity outside the Kingdom. 6-The expected period for which Personal Data shall be retained.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires the Controller to maintain records of Processing activities available to the Competent Authority on request, containing six minimum elements including recipients, cross-border transfer status and expected retention period.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم المتحكم بالاحتفاظ بسجلات أنشطة المعالجة وإتاحتها للجهة المختصة عند الطلب، على أن تتضمن ستة عناصر كحد أدنى منها الجهات المفصح لها والنقل خارج المملكة ومدة الاحتفاظ المتوقعة.
conditions: 1. contact details of the Controller
2. purpose of Processing
3. description of the categories of Data Subjects
4. any other entity of disclosure
5. whether data has been or will be transferred or disclosed outside the Kingdom
6. expected retention period

source_provisions.source_text: The Competent Authority may grant licenses to entities that conduct audits or checks of Personal Data Processing activities related to the Controller's activity, in accordance with the provisions stipulated in the Regulations. The Competent Authority shall set the conditions and criteria to grant such licenses, and the rules regulating them.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Empowers the Competent Authority to license entities that conduct audits or checks of Processing activities related to the Controller's activity, per the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يجيز للجهة المختصة ترخيص جهات تنفذ عمليات التدقيق أو الفحص لأنشطة معالجة البيانات المتعلقة بنشاط المتحكم وفق اللائحة.

source_provisions.source_text: A Data Subject may submit to the Competent Authority any complaint that may arise out of the implementation of this Law and the Regulations. The Regulations shall set out the rules for processing the complaints that may arise from implementing this Law and the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Gives the Data Subject the right to submit complaints to the Competent Authority, with complaint-handling rules deferred to the Regulations.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يمنح صاحب البيانات حق تقديم الشكاوى للجهة المختصة، وتحدد اللائحة قواعد معالجتها.

source_provisions.source_text: Without prejudice to any harsher penalty stipulated in another law, any individual discloses or publishes Sensitive Data, in violation of the provisions of the Law, with the intention of harming the Data Subject or achieving a personal benefit shall be punished with imprisonment for a period not exceeding (two years), or a fine not exceeding (three million) Riyals, or both.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Establishes a criminal penalty of imprisonment up to two years and/or a fine up to three million Riyals for disclosing or publishing Sensitive Data in violation of the Law with intent to harm the Data Subject or gain personal benefit.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يقرر عقوبة السجن مدة لا تزيد على سنتين أو غرامة لا تتجاوز ثلاثة ملايين ريال أو كليهما لمن يفصح عن بيانات حساسة أو ينشرها بالمخالفة للنظام بقصد الإضرار أو تحقيق منفعة.

source_provisions.source_text: In cases that are not covered in Article (35) herein and without prejudice to any harsher penalty stipulated in another law, a warning or a fine not exceeding (five million) Riyals shall be imposed on every person with a special natural or legal capacity - covered by the provisions of the Law - who violates any of the provisions of the Law or the Regulations. The fine penalty may be doubled in the event of a repeat violation, even if it results in exceeding its maximum limit, provided that it does not exceed double this limit.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Provides for a warning or a fine up to five million Riyals for violations of the Law or the Regulations not covered by Article 35, with doubling on repeat violation.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يقرر الإنذار أو غرامة لا تتجاوز خمسة ملايين ريال على مخالفة أحكام النظام أو اللائحة في غير الحالات الواردة في المادة الخامسة والثلاثين، مع مضاعفتها عند التكرار.

source_provisions.source_text: Any person that engages in the Processing of Personal Data shall protect the confidentiality of the Personal Data even after the end of such person's occupational or contractual relationship.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Requires any person engaged in Processing to protect the confidentiality of Personal Data, including after the end of their occupational or contractual relationship.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: يلزم كل من يعالج بيانات شخصية بالمحافظة على سريتها حتى بعد انتهاء علاقته الوظيفية أو التعاقدية.

source_provisions.source_text: This Law shall come into force after (seven hundred and twenty) days commencing on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_en: Provides that the Law enters into force 720 days after publication in the Official Gazette.
source_provisions.faithful_summary_ar: ينص على نفاذ النظام بعد سبعمائة وعشرين يوماً من تاريخ نشره في الجريدة الرسمية.

policies.name_en: Identification of Controller and Processor roles
applicability_conditions: The contract involves Processing of Personal Data within the scope of Article (2) of the Law.
not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

source_references.basis_summary: Defines the Controller as the party specifying the purpose and manner of Processing.
Defines the Processor as the party processing on behalf of and for the benefit of the Controller.
Places selection and monitoring duties on the Controller in respect of the Processor.

policies.contract_requirement_en: The contract should identify which party acts as Controller and which acts as Processor for each Processing activity, consistent with the definitions in Article (1)(18) and (1)(19) of the Law.
policies.contract_requirement_ar: ينبغي أن يحدد العقد صفة كل طرف كمتحكم أو معالج لكل نشاط معالجة بما يتوافق مع تعريفي المادة الأولى (18) و(19) من النظام.
required_evidence: An express statement of each party's role
A description of who determines the purpose and manner of Processing
acceptable_clause_examples: A clause stating that the customer is the Controller and the supplier acts as Processor solely on the Controller's documented instructions.
missing_clause_indicators: No reference anywhere in the contract to controller, processor, or equivalent role wording
non_compliance_indicators: A clause allowing the supplier to determine its own purposes for the Personal Data while being labelled a Processor
ambiguity_indicators: Role wording used inconsistently across the contract or its annexes

policies.name_en: Purpose limitation and restriction on secondary use

not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

Requires consent for any change of the Processing purpose except in cases stated in the Law.
Requires the Data Subject to be informed that data will not be processed inconsistently with the Collection purpose.

missing_clause_indicators: No clause addresses use of the Personal Data for purposes beyond the agreement

required_evidence: A retention clause or retention schedule
A statement of the basis for any extended retention
acceptable_clause_examples: A clause providing that the Personal Data is retained only for the duration of the services and thereafter only where a legal retention period applies, with that period identified.
missing_clause_indicators: No clause or schedule addresses how long the Personal Data is kept
non_compliance_indicators: A clause permitting retention indefinitely or in perpetuity

ambiguity_indicators: Retention described as in accordance with the recipient's internal policy without stating a period

decision_rule.missing: The contract does not address retention.

policies.name_en: Destruction of Personal Data after the purpose ends
applicability_conditions: The contract involves Processing of Personal Data within the scope of Article (2) of the Law.
not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

source_references.basis_summary: Requires the Controller to destroy the Personal Data without undue delay once it is no longer necessary for the collection purpose.
Requires destruction of previously collected data once no longer necessary.
Defines Destruction as rendering the data unreadable and irretrievable or the Data Subject unidentifiable.
Grants the Data Subject the right to request destruction, without prejudice to Article (18).

policies.contract_requirement_en: The contract should require destruction of the Personal Data once it is no longer necessary for the purpose or on termination, in a manner consistent with the definition of Destruction in Article (1)(7), subject to the retention cases in Article (18)(2).
policies.contract_requirement_ar: ينبغي أن يوجب العقد إتلاف البيانات متى لم تعد لازمة للغرض أو عند انتهاء العقد، بما يتفق مع تعريف الإتلاف في المادة الأولى (7)، مع مراعاة حالات الاحتفاظ في المادة الثامنة عشرة (2).
required_evidence: A destruction clause triggered by end of purpose or termination
A description of the destruction method or standard
Treatment of backups and copies
acceptable_clause_examples: A clause requiring the supplier to destroy all Personal Data, including copies and backups, within a defined period after termination, save where retention is required under Article (18)(2).
missing_clause_indicators: No clause addresses what happens to the Personal Data when the purpose ends or the contract terminates
non_compliance_indicators: A clause stating that no deletion is required after termination

Deletion described as subject to technical feasibility without limit

decision_rule.non_compliant: The contract removes the destruction obligation or permits post-termination retention for the recipient's own use.
decision_rule.ambiguous: Destruction is referenced without a trigger, timeframe or scope that can be assessed.
decision_rule.not_applicable: The agreement involves no Personal Data.

human_review_triggers: Backups or archives are excluded from the destruction obligation

policies.recommendation_en: Add a destruction obligation with a defined trigger and timeframe, extend it to copies and backups, and limit exceptions to Article (18)(2).

applicability_conditions: The contract involves Processing of Personal Data within the scope of Article (2) of the Law.
not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

source_references.basis_summary: Requires any person engaged in Processing to protect confidentiality even after the end of the occupational or contractual relationship.

policies.contract_requirement_en: The contract should impose a confidentiality obligation on the recipient and on its personnel that expressly continues after the end of the contractual relationship.
policies.contract_requirement_ar: ينبغي أن يفرض العقد التزاماً بالسرية على الجهة المستقبلة وعامليها يستمر صراحة بعد انتهاء العلاقة التعاقدية.
required_evidence: A confidentiality clause covering Personal Data
An express survival provision
An obligation binding personnel
acceptable_clause_examples: A clause under which the supplier and its personnel keep the Personal Data confidential and under which that obligation survives termination or expiry of the agreement.
missing_clause_indicators: No confidentiality clause covers the Personal Data
non_compliance_indicators: A clause under which confidentiality obligations expire on termination or after a fixed period shorter than the retention of the data
ambiguity_indicators: Confidentiality expressed as a general commercial obligation without covering Personal Data or personnel

decision_rule.missing: The contract has no confidentiality obligation covering the Personal Data.
decision_rule.non_compliant: Confidentiality obligations expire while the recipient still holds the Personal Data.
decision_rule.ambiguous: Confidentiality is present but its scope or survival cannot be determined.
decision_rule.not_applicable: The agreement involves no Personal Data.

human_review_triggers: Confidentiality is limited to a fixed term
Personnel and subcontractors are not covered
policies.recommendation_en: Extend confidentiality expressly to Personal Data and personnel and make it survive termination without a fixed expiry.
policies.recommendation_ar: وسّع التزام السرية صراحة ليشمل البيانات الشخصية والعاملين، واجعله مستمراً بعد انتهاء العقد دون مدة منتهية.

policies.name_en: Organizational, administrative and technical security measures

not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

policies.contract_requirement_ar: ينبغي أن يوجب العقد على الجهة المستقبلة تطبيق تدابير تنظيمية وإدارية وتقنية لحماية البيانات، بما في ذلك أثناء نقلها.

An express reference to protection during transmission or transfer
acceptable_clause_examples: A security schedule setting out the organizational, administrative and technical measures applied by the supplier, including measures applied while the data is in transit.
missing_clause_indicators: No clause addresses protection of the Personal Data
non_compliance_indicators: A clause disclaiming responsibility for the security of the Personal Data
A clause under which security measures may be reduced unilaterally
ambiguity_indicators: Security described only as industry standard or reasonable measures with no specified content
Security measures referenced in a document that is not incorporated into the contract

decision_rule.compliant: The contract imposes organizational, administrative and technical measures covering the data including in transit.
decision_rule.missing: The contract contains no security obligation for the Personal Data.
decision_rule.non_compliant: The contract disclaims security responsibility or permits unilateral reduction of measures.
decision_rule.ambiguous: Security obligations are referenced but their content cannot be determined from the contract.
decision_rule.not_applicable: The agreement involves no Personal Data.

human_review_triggers: Sensitive Data is processed

policies.recommendation_en: Incorporate a security schedule describing the measures applied and include protection of the data in transit.

applicability_conditions: The contract involves Processing of Personal Data within the scope of Article (2) of the Law.

A description of the Processor's data protection controls or certifications

applicability_conditions: The contract involves Processing of Personal Data within the scope of Article (2) of the Law.
not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

source_references.basis_summary: Requires the Controller to respond to Data Subject requests within the period and by the method set out in the Regulations.

policies.contract_requirement_en: The contract should provide a timeframe within which the recipient responds to or forwards Data Subject requests so the Controller can meet the response period set out in the Regulations.

decision_rule.missing: No response timeframe is stated for Data Subject requests.

source_references.basis_summary: Requires the Controller to notify every entity to which the data was transferred of any correction, completion or update and to make the amendment available.

policies.contract_requirement_en: Where Personal Data is transferred onward under the contract, the contract should support notification of corrections, completions and updates to every entity that received the data.

not_applicable_conditions: The contract involves no Personal Data as defined in Article (1)(4) of the Law.

source_references.basis_summary: Defines the categories that constitute Sensitive Data.
Excludes legitimate interest as a basis where Sensitive Data is processed.
Excludes legitimate interest as a disclosure basis where Sensitive Data is involved.
Excludes Sensitive Data from Processing for marketing purposes.
Establishes a criminal penalty for unlawful disclosure or publication of Sensitive Data with intent to harm or gain benefit.

policies.contract_requirement_en: Where Sensitive Data is within scope, the contract should identify it as such and should not rely on legitimate interest for its Processing or disclosure, nor permit its use for marketing.
policies.contract_requirement_ar: متى شمل النطاق بيانات حساسة، ينبغي أن يحددها العقد بوصفها كذلك، وألا يستند إلى المصلحة المشروعة في معالجتها أو الإفصاح عنها، وألا يجيز استخدامها للتسويق.

non_compliance_indicators: A clause relying on legitimate interest to process or disclose Sensitive Data
A clause permitting Sensitive Data to be used for marketing purposes
ambiguity_indicators: Data categories described in terms that may or may not include Sensitive Data, such as employee records or customer profile

decision_rule.compliant: Sensitive Data is identified and the contract avoids legitimate interest as its basis and excludes it from marketing use.
decision_rule.missing: Sensitive Data is in scope but the contract does not identify or address it.
decision_rule.non_compliant: The contract relies on legitimate interest for Sensitive Data or permits its use for marketing.
decision_rule.ambiguous: It cannot be determined from the data categories whether Sensitive Data is in scope.
decision_rule.not_applicable: No Sensitive Data as defined in Article (1)(11) is within scope.
